chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 284 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.6845/2025 (C/A) 27.10.2025 M/s Mehfooz Ahmed Awan, Farhan Ali Shaikh and Ateeq-ur-Rehman Shaikh, Advocates for the Applicant >>>>>..<<<<< Through the listed application, the Petitioner / Applicant has prayed for initiation of contempt proceedings against the Respondent/Contemnor for alleged disobedience of the orders of this Court. The order dated 14.03.2025 reflects that specific directions were issued to Respondent No.1 to decide the Departmental Appeal of the Petitioner within a period of one month. However, the Applicant / Petitioner has not mentioned the date and time when he approached the Respondent / Contemnor in compliance with the said order. In the circumstances, no case for initiating contempt proceedings is made out. Consequently, the listed application is dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
